productive_behavior: A failed bounded Python extraction was retried successfully inside the same audited run.
The first critic finding correctly detected that formatting-only output did not satisfy the requested scientific critique.
Later research acquired PubMed articles and added domain context.
avoidable_behavior: The critic combined main-manuscript and supplement word counts without an evidenced task rule.
The critic treated explicitly permitted title-page placeholders as scientific blockers.
The critic demanded task-specific top-level headings that conflict with the controller-owned article schema.
TIFF source figures were registered as inline report figures instead of being converted for Gemma-only visual review.
Invalid display preparation prevented the completed article audit from being retained in repair rounds 3 and 4.
disposition: Retained as a failed scientific-quality gate; not counted as a passing release evaluation.
implemented_repairs: Task-scoped critic instructions reject invented word-count, journal, placeholder, and readiness rules.
The fixed IMRaD-style ScientificReport schema outranks alternative requested top-level headings while preserving requested content.
Controller conversion supports bounded TIFF, PDF, ZIP, DOCX, and PPTX source visuals.
Only Gemma receives source/display rasters; Qwen receives structured observations and explicit coverage gaps.
Article-review results survive invalid display preparation and remain separately auditable.
